name: ChaiYao Fractional Token
description: For the chaiyao.io (Chai Huang Coin) project, using a single piece from a top-tier Chai Kiln system collection as the underlying asset, establish a standardized certification structure consisting of an "auction transaction record + bank safe deposit box custody document." Then, write its immutable hash and governance events into a smart contract, thereby completing a full implementation solution for art RWA (Real-World Assets).
